summary: Iteration 120 - P0 Perspective Wording Bug Fix Testing: All 15 backend tests passed (100%), 3 skipped (no matching test data). Frontend verified working correctly. The is_target and is_me fields are correctly returned by the API and used by the frontend for perspective-aware wording.

backend_pytest_unit: ✅ test_is_target_normal_participant - When user IS the target, is_target=True
✅ test_is_target_organizer_not_target - When organizer is NOT target, is_target=False
✅ test_is_target_deadlock_organizer_is_target - Deadlock case: organizer IS target, is_target=True AND my_role=organizer
✅ test_is_me_multiple_declarants_n3 - N=3 participants: correct is_me flags
frontend_playwright: ✅ Login flow works for organizer and counterpart
✅ Target perspective: 'Votre présence n'a pas pu être vérifiée' shown when is_target=true
✅ Non-target perspective: 'La présence de {name}' shown when is_target=false
✅ is_me=true: 'Vous avez déclaré' with correct verb conjugation
✅ is_me=false: '{first_name} a déclaré' with third-person conjugation
✅ Declaration summary shows 'Vous' instead of first_name when is_me=true

skipped_tests: test_organizer_not_target_sees_is_target_false - No dispute where organizer is NOT target (only deadlock case exists)
test_participant_target_sees_is_target_true - No dispute where participant user is target
test_viewer_declaration_has_is_me_true - Organizer didn't submit declaration about target

success_rate.backend: 100% (15/15 tests passed, 3 skipped due to no matching test data)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 perspective wording fix verified. Key changes: (1) Backend _enrich_dispute_for_user now sets is_target based on target_user_id == user_id, (2) Backend _get_anonymized_summary now accepts viewer_user_id and sets is_me on each declarant, (3) Frontend DisputeDetailPage uses dispute.is_target for target perspective wording, (4) Frontend DeclarationSummaryBlock shows 'Vous' when is_me=true with correct verb conjugation 'avez déclaré'. The only dispute in the database is a resolved deadlock case (organizer=target). To test non-deadlock cases, create a new dispute where organizer != target.

features_verified.4_is_target_logic: ✅ VERIFIED - is_target=true when target_user_id matches viewer
features_verified.6_frontend_target_perspective: ✅ VERIFIED - 'Votre présence est contestée' when is_target=true
features_verified.9_frontend_verb_conjugation: ✅ VERIFIED - 'avez déclaré' for is_me=true, 'a déclaré' for is_me=false
